ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date the race occurred */,
  "cars_participated" INTEGER /* Number of cars that participated in the race */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning driver */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the race took place */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the race took place */,
  "length" REAL /* Race length in miles */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Total laps completed */,
  "speed_avg" REAL /* Average speed of the race in mph */,
  "purse" REAL /* Total prize purse for the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance at the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the driver is associated with */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of race wins by the driver */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "make_model" TEXT /* Make and model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V8, V6) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car's engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race related to this result */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who participated */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car used by the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the driver */,
  "laps_completed" INTEGER /* Total laps completed by the driver */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the driver during the race */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the driver in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poles" (
  "pole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pole position */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race where the pole was achieved */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who secured the pole */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car used by the driver */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Lap time of the driver during qualifying */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the driver during qualifying */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poles_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poles_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cautions" (
  "caution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caution */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race during which the caution occurred */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number when the caution was called */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the caution */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the caution in laps */,
  "cars_involved" INTEGER /* Number of cars involved in the caution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cautions_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in miles */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of track surface (e.g., asphalt, dirt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship record */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race being sponsored */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor providing the funds */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money provided by the sponsor */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date the sponsorship was activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, analyst, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
